title: I have a quick technical question
display_title: I have a quick technical question
wikitext:
[]: I have a quick technical question.             Quote Post by Makocalamity » Sat Jul 09, 2011 4:58 pm Did anyone pick up the the dvd or blu ray bundle packs with the Rei flashlights? Mine fell off my keychain a few months ago and I can't find the right type of batteries to power it. It's really frustrating because I've been looking for months and I paid like $60 to get it. I would be eternally grateful if anyone could open theirs up and shoot the battery information my way. Thanks again.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Jul 09, 2011 6:48 pm What Eva DVD/BD are you referring to?

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Sat Jul 09, 2011 7:24 pm I think that Makocalamity is referring to the Hong Kong release (which is legit and has English subs). To be honest, I haven't heard anything about the exact technical nature of any of those pack-in items. Assuming that you are referring to the HK version, I'd recommend contacting the licensee, NeoVision Company Limited. Their email address is: [email protected]

[]:             Quote Post by Makocalamity » Sun Jul 10, 2011 6:30 am Yeah, I could do that or call YesAsia...I saw a while back that a few people here were going to pick up the bundle and hoped I'd get lucky. I spent like 30 minutes at radioshack to no avail.
